name: arthritis
title: best herbal teas for arthritis
description: Zingiber officinale tea contains bioactive constituents such as gingerols and shogaols, which are known to help alleviate the symptoms of arthritis by reducing inflammation and pain. The anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties of this herbal tea also help to protect the joints from damage and promote overall well-being.
